name: Gutenberg

en.when_to_use: Use it when a report, handout, or article needs print typography, orphan control, repeated table headers, and page-break helper classes instead of a hand-written print stylesheet, which often omits orphans/widows, figure/table breaks, and link-expansion rules. Do not use it as a paper-pagination engine or for running headers/page counters.
en.why_valuable: AI usually writes only basic @media print rules and cannot systematically cover heading cohesion, orphans and widows, repeating table headers, media breaks, and printed expansion of links and abbreviations. Gutenberg packages these stable rules into one CSS file.

data_in.note: html is the semantic content to print. break-before, break-after, avoid-break-inside, no-print, and no-reformat are native upstream classes. The base CSS must load together with the optional theme.

schema.html: string -- trusted or sanitized semantic HTML article; may use break-before, break-after, avoid-break-inside, no-print, and no-reformat
schema.theme?: 'modern' | 'oldstyle' | 'none' -- defaults to 'modern'; none loads only dist/gutenberg.css

spec.note: This is a long, flowing print document rather than a fixed canvas. The host preview keeps an explicit 900px height and scrolls; do not use vh or percentage heights. Actual page geometry is controlled by the browser or Paged.js; Gutenberg handles only typography and break rules.

when_to_use: 需要给报告、讲义或文章补齐打印排版、孤行控制、表头复现和断页辅助类时用它而非手写 print stylesheet,因为原生手写常漏掉 orphans/widows、figure/table 断页与链接展开规则;非做纸张分页引擎或 running header/page counter。
why_valuable: AI 默认只会写基础 @media print,做不到系统覆盖标题粘连、孤行寡行、表头跨页、媒体断页、链接与缩写打印展开;Gutenberg 把这些稳定规则打包成一份 CSS。

data_in._why_no_example: 语义 HTML 与打印辅助 class 是 AI 原生记法;schema 已钉死实际 class 与主题文件,无需 minimal example。
data_in.note: html 是要打印的语义内容;break-before、break-after、avoid-break-inside、no-print、no-reformat 都是上游原生 class。base CSS 必须与可选主题一起加载。

schema.html: string —— 可信或已清洗的语义 HTML article;可使用 break-before、break-after、avoid-break-inside、no-print、no-reformat

spec.note: 这是长流式打印文档而非固定 canvas;宿主预览默认保留 900px 明确高度并滚动,禁止 vh/百分比高。实际纸张几何由浏览器或 Paged.js 决定,Gutenberg 只负责排版与断页规则。

carriers.widget: conditional:CSS 可放入 shadow 预览通用 typography 与辅助 class,但 body padding 和真实打印页语义会降级;最终打印应走 artifact/codex
carriers.codex: supported:base/theme CSS 进入 sandbox iframe head,浏览器打印能力可用

isolation.evidence: 无运行时 JS,零自主副作用。artifact/codex boot 用 media=print 进 head(仅打印生效不污染屏幕),widget boot 采纳进 shadowRoot。但 gutenberg.css 含 body 页边距/@page/@media print 文档级规则,shadow 内 body/@page 不生效——通用 typography+辅助 class 可用,纸张页语义降级(carriers.widget=conditional)。

minimal.html:
The Printer's Grammar

Screen-only note — hidden when this article is sent to paper.

Typography is the craft of giving human language a durable visual form. A good print stylesheet controls orphans and widows, keeps a heading welded to the text beneath it, and repeats table headers across every page.

Type is a beautiful group of letters, not a group of beautiful letters.

— Matthew Carter

Measured Values

ElementRuleLines
Body textorphans / widows3
Headingavoid break after—
Figureavoid break inside—

Read the full specification at example.org/spec.
